message:
Add 103 integration test files covering engine modules end-to-end

Systematic integration-test sweep across the entire franken-engine crate,
providing comprehensive end-to-end coverage for all major subsystems:

Parser & lexer: parser_arena, parser_oracle, parser_error_recovery,
  parallel_parser, simd_lexer integration tests
Governance & policy: governance_hooks, governance_scorecard,
  one_lever_policy, disruption_scorecard, frontier_demo_gate tests
Evidence & proof: evidence_ledger, evidence_ordering, evidence_emission,
  evidence_contract, proof_schema, proof_specialization tests
Security: capability_token, key_attestation, key_derivation,
  signature_preimage, sorted_multisig, trust_card, trust_zone tests
Runtime: containment_executor, lab_runtime, monitor_scheduler,
  supervision, gc_pause, cancellation_lifecycle tests
Specialization: specialization_conformance, specialization_index,
  specialization_lane_gate, specialization_perf_release_gate tests
PLAS pipeline: plas_benchmark_bundle, plas_burn_in_gate, plas_lockstep,
  plas_release_gate, proof_release_gate tests
And 60+ additional module integration tests covering delegation chains,
flow envelopes, migration kits, obligation channels, remote computation,
revocation enforcement, and more.

Includes benchmark_e2e and test262_release_gate fixture artifacts.
103 new test files totaling ~158k lines.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
